name: Wireshark
description: Wireshark is a useful network analysis surface inside Cybersecurity.
whyUseIt: People in Cybersecurity use Wireshark to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using Wireshark as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from Wireshark.
